request.prompt:
Verify exactly one K-pop event candidate using web search. Do not bundle another event.

Candidate ID: b7c-f1
Artist: MONSTA X
Claimed dates: October 25, 2026
Claimed venue: Moda Center
Claimed city/country: Portland, OR, USA
Raw candidate title: MONSTA X live event at Moda Center on October 25, 2026

Strict evidence rules (do not relax): exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence; accept only an official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing, or reliable media source; artist AND exact date(s) must match (timezone tolerance only ±1 day); venue/city must not conflict; a general tour announcement without this stop/date is not a match. Return UNCONFIRMED if no qualifying source is found and CONTRADICTED if reliable evidence conflicts.

Return only these compact fields, in this order. Cite factual claims with the web-search citation mechanism:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED | UNCONFIRMED | CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true | false
DATE_MATCH: true | false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: true | false
MATCHED_DATES: ...
SOURCE_QUALITY: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media | none
SOURCE_URLS: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

text:
**VERDICT:** CONTRADICTED

**ARTIST_MATCH:** true

**DATE_MATCH:** false

**VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH:** false

**MATCHED_DATES:** None for October 25, 2026 or Portland, OR

- https://www.livenation.com/artist/K8vZ9174TNV/monsta-x-events

**REASON:** 
The MONSTA X 2026 North American tour (THE X : NEXUS) runs from October 3 in Fairfax, VA through October 24 at the WAMU Theater in Seattle
 — 
with all 10 confirmed stops being Fairfax, New York, Boston, Toronto, Rosemont, Irving, Phoenix, Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Seattle
 — neither Portland, OR, Moda Center, nor October 25, 2026 appear anywhere in the official schedule, and 
the Moda Center's own event calendar lists no MONSTA X event on or around October 25, 2026.
